title: Product of Array Except Self
output_format: An array `answer` such that `answer[i]` is equal to the product of all the elements of `nums` except `nums[i]`.
constraints:
- `2 <= nums.length <= 10^5`
- `-30 <= nums[i] <= 30`
- The product of any prefix or suffix of `nums` is guaranteed to fit in a 32-bit integer.
